eventPreCondition: Play if at least one Companion is in the Fellowship.
eventText: Separate one Companion or one group of Companions from the Fellowship. You may move the Companions one extra region. Then, heal one Corruption point.
combatPreCondition: Play if a Companion is in the battle.
combatText: Forfeit the Leadership of all the Companions participating in the battle to cancel the Combat card played by the Shadow player.
